issues.title: HTTP 404 on navigation
issues.detail: Requested https://faculty-dashboard-eight.vercel.app/database/database/database returned status 404.
issues.evidence: Requested https://faculty-dashboard-eight.vercel.app/database/database/database returned status 404.

issues.title: Icon-only or unlabeled buttons
issues.detail: 48 button(s) lack accessible name across 24 step(s).
issues.evidence: 48 button(s) lack accessible name across 24 step(s).

issues.title: Form inputs missing labels
issues.detail: 1 of 3 inputs lack label, aria-label, or placeholder.
issues.evidence: 1 of 3 inputs lack label, aria-label, or placeholder.

issues.title: Console errors on page
issues.detail: 1 console error(s): Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 ()
issues.evidence: 1 console error(s): Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 ()

issues.title: Sparse page content
issues.detail: Page body has very little text — value proposition may be unclear.
issues.evidence: Page body has very little text — value proposition may be unclear.

issues.title: Slow step completion
issues.detail: Step took 40728ms (>8s perceived delay threshold).
issues.evidence: Step took 40728ms (>8s perceived delay threshold).

issues.title: Crawl found error pages
issues.detail: Paths: /database/database
issues.evidence: Paths: /database/database

issues.title: Auth-gated routes without login surface in crawl
issues.detail: Some paths redirect to login but no /login-style route was classified — wayfinding gap.
issues.evidence: Some paths redirect to login but no /login-style route was classified — wayfinding gap.

issues.title: No signup/registration option on login page
issues.detail: The login page only displays 'Welcome Back' and offers login for existing users. New signup users have no way to register or create an account, which blocks onboarding entirely.
issues.evidence: The login page only displays 'Welcome Back' and offers login for existing users. New signup users have no way to register or create an account, which blocks onboarding entirely.

issues.title: All click actions fail after login page
issues.detail: Every click attempt (both on login and subsequent journeys) results in a failure with no error message or transition, suggesting broken interaction logic or missing elements.
issues.evidence: Every click attempt (both on login and subsequent journeys) results in a failure with no error message or transition, suggesting broken interaction logic or missing elements.

issues.title: Initial navigation to '/' or '/database' fails with redirect
issues.detail: Navigating to the root or dashboard URL results in a failed step before redirecting to /login, which may confuse users expecting direct access.
issues.evidence: Navigating to the root or dashboard URL results in a failed step before redirecting to /login, which may confuse users expecting direct access.

issues.title: Unlabeled buttons on login page
issues.detail: 48 button(s) lack accessible name across 24 step(s).
issues.evidence: 48 button(s) lack accessible name across 24 step(s).

issues.title: Login submission fails across all devices
issues.detail: The click action on the login page (step s3) consistently fails after entering credentials, preventing any access to the dashboard. This blocks all core tasks for power users.
issues.evidence: The click action on the login page (step s3) consistently fails after entering credentials, preventing any access to the dashboard. This blocks all core tasks for power users.

issues.title: Login form buttons are unlabeled
issues.detail: 48 button(s) lack accessible name across 24 step(s).
issues.evidence: 48 button(s) lack accessible name across 24 step(s).

issues.title: Login form submission fails silently
issues.detail: Click actions on the login page (step j-argyle-login-p1-new-signup-s3-desktop-seed1-loop1 and equivalent) fail without any error message or feedback, preventing users from logging in and accessing any dashboard features.
issues.evidence: Click actions on the login page (step j-argyle-login-p1-new-signup-s3-desktop-seed1-loop1 and equivalent) fail without any error message or feedback, preventing users from logging in and accessing any dashboard features.

issues.title: Login page has 2 unlabeled buttons
issues.detail: 48 button(s) lack accessible name across 24 step(s).
issues.evidence: 48 button(s) lack accessible name across 24 step(s).

issues.title: Login form submission fails on all devices
issues.detail: After navigating to the login page and entering credentials, the click action on the login button fails (step outcome 'fail') across desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports. This prevents authentication and blocks all subsequent journeys.
issues.evidence: After navigating to the login page and entering credentials, the click action on the login button fails (step outcome 'fail') across desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports. This prevents authentication and blocks all subsequent journeys.

issues.title: Dashboard inaccessible behind authentication wall
issues.detail: Every attempt to navigate to /database results in an immediate redirect to /login, and subsequent click actions on the login page fail (no credentials submitted). No dashboard content is reachable, making the entire product non-functional for an unauthenticated test user.
issues.evidence: Every attempt to navigate to /database results in an immediate redirect to /login, and subsequent click actions on the login page fail (no credentials submitted). No dashboard content is reachable, making the entire product non-functional for an unauthenticated test user.

issues.title: Login flow appears broken; no successful authentication possible
issues.detail: Login page renders with email/password fields and a Login button, but all click actions (step s3) time out or fail, and no successful login occurs. This prevents any further testing of dashboard features.
issues.evidence: Login page renders with email/password fields and a Login button, but all click actions (step s3) time out or fail, and no successful login occurs. This prevents any further testing of dashboard features.

scorecardMd:
# Launch Rehearsal — Scorecard

| Field | Value |
|-------|--------|
| **Run ID** | `argyle-20260608-002317` |
| **Date** | 2026-06-08 |
| **Target** | https://faculty-dashboard-eight.vercel.app/database |
| **Product** | Argyle Faculty Dashboard |
| **Outcome** | complete |
| **Duration** | 313s |

---

## Executive summary

| | |
|---|---|
| **Readiness** | **Red** |
| **Top blocker** | HTTP 404 on navigation |
| **Top delight** | Interactive forms discovered |
| **Issues** | 19 |
| **Delights** | 3 |

| **Pages crawled** | 1 |
| **Auto journeys added** | 1 |

---

## Persona × journey matrix

| Journey | P1 New | P2 Power | P3 Developer | P4 Internal | P5 Internal |
|---------|--------|--------|--------|--------|--------|
| **j-argyle-login** Login to Argyle | **Fail** | **Fail** | **Fail** | **Fail** | **Fail** |
| **j-argyle-explore-dashboard** Explore Dashboard | **Fail** | **Fail** | **Fail** | **Fail** | **Fail** |
| **j-argyle-view-users** View Users List | **Fail** | **Fail** | **Fail** | **Fail** | **Fail** |
| **j-argyle-admin-settings** Access Admin Settings | **Fail** | **Fail** | **Fail** | **Fail** | **Fail** |
| **j-argyle-team-collaboration** Test Team Collaboration | **Fail** | **Fail** | **Fail** | **Fail** | **Fail** |
| **auto-j1-dashboard** Auto: Dashboard | **Fail** | **Fail** | **Fail** | **Fail** | **Fail** |

## Dimension rollup (automated subset)

| Dimension | Score 1–5 | Signal |
|-----------|-----------|--------|
| Functionality | 2 | 41% steps pass; 30 failures |
| UI/UX | 2 | 48 unlabeled buttons; 24/72 inputs unlabeled; ~3920ms avg step |
| Information clarity | 2 | 27 content-sparse pages; 0 headings; 0 links |

---

## Issues (evidence-bound)

### P1

| ID | Finding | Personas | Evidence |
|----|---------|----------|----------|
| **I1** | HTTP 404 on navigation — Requested https://faculty-dashboard-eight.vercel.app/database/database/database returned status 404. | p4-internal-champion | `auto-j1-dashboard-p1-new-signup-s1-desktop-seed1-loop1` |
| **I7** | Crawl found error pages — Paths: /database/database | p4-internal-champion | `crawl-graph` |
| **I9** | No signup/registration option on login page — The login page only displays 'Welcome Back' and offers login for existing users. personas.name: New signup
personas.goal: Complete onboarding and reach first success

personas.name: Developer dogfooder

narrative.executiveSummary: Argyle Faculty Dashboard at https://faculty-dashboard-eight.vercel.app/database rehearsed as **Red** readiness. 7/17 canonical steps passed (41%). 19 issue(s) and 3 delight(s) recorded. Primary concern: HTTP 404 on navigation. Bright spot: Interactive forms discovered.
narrative.forFounders:
**Launch readiness: Red** — suitable for internal review before external calls.
Broken journeys: Login to Argyle, Explore Dashboard, View Users List, Access Admin Settings.
Blockers to discuss: HTTP 404 on navigation; Crawl found error pages; No signup/registration option on login page.
narrative.forEngineering:
Run `argyle-20260608-002317` · 0s · 51 step records (incl. viewport/seed replays).
Crawl: 1 pages, 1 error paths, 0 orphans.
Network log: `/Users/sparshnagpal/Desktop/projects/TryLapse/launch-rehearsal/artifacts/artifacts/argyle-20260608-002317/network-log.json`.
Notable P2: Icon-only or unlabeled buttons; Form inputs missing labels; Console errors on page; Sparse page content.
suggestedQuestions: What is the single blocker we should fix before the next partner call?
Why did Login to Argyle fail?
Did any step show flaky behavior across seeds or viewports?

key_friction_points: Page failed to load for new user
No sign-up option on login page
Accessibility issues: unlabeled buttons, missing headings
No content or navigation after click

ux_improvements.finding: Login page only serves returning users, no sign-up path for new users
ux_improvements.recommendation: Add a clear 'Sign Up' link or button on the login page

ux_improvements.finding: Page failed to load without any error message or fallback
ux_improvements.recommendation: Implement error handling and display a user-friendly message when page fails to load

ux_improvements.finding: Buttons are unlabeled and headings are missing, causing accessibility issues
ux_improvements.recommendation: Add proper aria-labels to buttons and ensure headings are present and descriptive

ux_improvements.finding: After click, page lacks any content or navigation
ux_improvements.recommendation: Ensure all pages have meaningful content and navigation elements

information_access_issues: No error feedback when page fails to load
Missing labels and headings for screen readers
j-argyle-login:p1-new-signup.behavioral_summary: As a new user trying to sign up, I encountered a login page that only serves returning users. The page failed to load without any feedback, and there was no sign-up option, making it impossible to proceed. This journey completely failed to meet my goal of onboarding.

j-argyle-explore-dashboard:p1-new-signup.behavioral_summary: Template verdict — enable LLM for behavioral analysis

key_friction_points: Step 1: Technical failure on navigation to database page
Step 2: No sign-up path, only login page for first-time user
Step 3: Click action failed to load Users List page

ux_improvements.finding: First-time user cannot find sign-up option; only login is presented.
ux_improvements.recommendation: Add a prominent 'Sign Up' link or button on the login page.

ux_improvements.finding: Technical failure on page load provides no error message or guidance.
ux_improvements.recommendation: Implement clear error messages and a retry or back-to-home button.

ux_improvements.finding: No onboarding flow for new users; they are dropped into login.
ux_improvements.recommendation: Create a guided onboarding or sign-up-first flow for new users.

information_access_issues: No error explanation after technical failure
No way to view users list as intended
j-argyle-view-users:p1-new-signup.behavioral_summary: As a new user, I tried to view the users list but hit a technical failure immediately. Then I was confused by a login page with no sign-up option, and my click to proceed failed again. I couldn't complete my goal at all.

key_friction_points: Navigation step failed with no page content or links
Login page lacks guidance for first-time users
Click action resulted in blank/broken page with no error messages

ux_improvements.finding: No error messages or navigation elements on broken pages
ux_improvements.recommendation: Provide clear error messages and a way to return to previous step

ux_improvements.finding: Unlabeled buttons and missing headings on login page
ux_improvements.recommendation: Add descriptive labels and headings to guide users

ux_improvements.finding: Login page shows 'Welcome Back' which is inappropriate for new signups
ux_improvements.recommendation: Personalize content based on user status; show onboarding steps for new users

information_access_issues: No indication of how to proceed after login
Missing onboarding instructions or next steps
No access to admin settings or help documentation
j-argyle-admin-settings:p1-new-signup.behavioral_summary: As a new user trying to complete onboarding and access admin settings, I encountered a dead end at every step. The navigation failed, the login page was confusing, and clicking led to a blank page with no guidance. I couldn't achieve my goal and felt completely stuck.

key_friction_points: Navigation step failed with no content
Login page has no sign-up option for new users
Message restricts access to authorized users only

ux_improvements.finding: No sign-up link or option for new users on login page
ux_improvements.recommendation: Add a prominent 'Sign Up' or 'Create Account' button on the login page

ux_improvements.finding: Navigation step failed silently with no error message or content
ux_improvements.recommendation: Provide clear error feedback and a way to retry or navigate back

ux_improvements.finding: Message 'Only a' is incomplete and confusing
ux_improvements.recommendation: Replace with clear, complete messaging about access restrictions and next steps
Label all buttons with descriptive text (e.g., 'Login', 'Sign Up')

information_access_issues: No sign-up option or guidance for first-time users
No explanation of how to get access or create an account
Incomplete message 'Only a' provides no useful information
j-argyle-team-collaboration:p1-new-signu.behavioral_summary: As a new user, I hit a dead end immediately: the navigation failed, and then I landed on a login page with no way to sign up. The system seems designed only for existing users, leaving me stuck and unable to proceed with onboarding.

key_friction_points: Login page shown instead of sign-up for first-time user
Page content truncated, missing full instructions

ux_improvements.finding: First-time user is directed to login page with no sign-up option
ux_improvements.recommendation: Redirect new users to a sign-up/registration page or provide a clear 'Create Account' link on the login page

ux_improvements.finding: Page text is cut off, showing 'Only a' which is incomplete
ux_improvements.recommendation: Ensure full content is displayed, e.g., 'Only a few steps left' or similar

ux_improvements.finding: No clear path for new users to register
ux_improvements.recommendation: Add a prominent 'Sign Up' button or link on the login page

information_access_issues: Could not find a way to create an account
auto-j1-dashboard:p1-new-signup.behavioral_summary: As a first-time user, I was immediately blocked because the page only offers login without any sign-up option. The truncated text adds confusion. I cannot proceed with onboarding at all.
